quote: I came to my session feeling completely stuck and weighed down by patterns I couldn't explain. From the moment I sat down with Dodie, I felt an immediate sense of peace and safety. I walked out of her office seeing the world in high definition — with a profound understanding of why my life has unfolded the way it has. If you are looking for more than just answers, book a session. It truly changed everything for me.
author: Client testimonial
